codeReview.summary: The implementation aligns with the feature contract: singular `skill` and `rule` commands now apply support-matrix filtering consistently (matching `subagent`) and emit explicit no-op messaging when an explicit agent selection yields no applicable targets. Added integration coverage (mock + real) exercises VAL-SCOPE-009 minimal-install behavior and VAL-SCOPE-010 scope/applicability behavior across singular command families.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit b916dda diff, transcript skeleton, and skill procedure context. No blocking or non-blocking defects were found for this feature; implementation and coverage are consistent with expected behavior for explicit minimal installs and singular scope/applicability handling.
